_doc: Multi-concept synthetic contrast set (Axis 1 / source). Hand-written, clearly synthetic, no copyrighted text. Four DISTINCT concepts so the harness can test cross-behavior generalization (addresses the single-behavior limitation) and multi-vector stacking (E17-E26). Each pair: pos expresses the concept, neg is neutral/opposite.

ocean.pos: The deep blue ocean rolled with salty waves and tides.
ocean.neg: The accountant filed the quarterly tax report on time.

anger.pos: He slammed the door, furious and shaking with rage.
anger.neg: The librarian shelved the returned books quietly.

anger.pos: His furious outburst startled everyone in the room.
anger.neg: The fence posts were spaced evenly along the path.
